category_sources: The official SourceForge git README describes AVFS as enabling programs to look inside archived, compressed, and remote files.
source_facts.description says AVFS is a virtual file system for looking inside archives.
display_name_sources: The official homepage and SourceForge project title use AVFS.
docs_sources: The official SourceForge git repository README contains usage and installation documentation pointers.
source_facts.homepage is the official AVFS homepage.
repo_sources: The official SourceForge AVFS project exposes a Git repository at sourceforge.net/p/avf/git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository lookup was required.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a virtual file system for archives.
source_facts.executables lists avfsd, mountavfs, and umountavfs.
